41.reason: [This loop does not stop at newline; it continues until EOF, which means it will consume all remaining input including potential extra data, but more critically, it doesn't handle the case where input ends with newline correctly on all systems. 72.reason: [The comparison function `cmp` returns (x1 - x2), which sorts in ascending order. Printing from h-1 down to 0 gives descending order, which is correct. However, if multiple terms have the same exponent and cancel out (sum to zero), they are still printed, violating the requirement to only output non-zero terms.]
